chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 1999 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 11.02.2026 Mr. Jamil Ahmed Shan, Advocate for the Petitioner. ---------- Learned counsel states on instructions that this Petition is not being pressed any further. In view of such statement, the Petition stands dismissed accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz
